label: Dzaleka Heritage Item Types
definition: The primary classification of heritage items within the Dzaleka Metadata Standard.

hasTopConcept.label: Story
hasTopConcept.definition: Narrative accounts, oral histories, or literary prose.

hasTopConcept.label: Audio Recording
hasTopConcept.definition: Sound recordings, music, or interviews without video.

hasTopConcept.label: Video Recording
hasTopConcept.definition: Moving images with or without sound.

hasTopConcept.label: Event
hasTopConcept.definition: Historical or cultural happenings, ceremonies, or gatherings.

hasTopConcept.label: Map
hasTopConcept.definition: Cartographic representations of the camp or surrounding areas.

hasTopConcept.label: Visual Artwork
hasTopConcept.definition: Paintings, drawings, or other visual creations (non-photo).

hasTopConcept.label: Heritage Site
hasTopConcept.definition: Physical locations, buildings, or landmarks of significance.

hasTopConcept.label: Poem
hasTopConcept.definition: Literary works in verse or poetic form.

changeLog.message: Expanded the artwork definition to better cover non-photographic visual works.
Deprecated 'image' in favor of more specific terms.

deprecated.label: Image
changeNote: Replaced by the more specific DMS terms 'photo' and 'artwork'.
